checks.name: Single-file app size
checks.detail: One 23k-line HTML file is the known central architectural constraint — the consolidation work (zero-feature-loss) is the standing plan to reduce it.

checks.name: Functions defined
checks.detail: Total named functions in the app.

checks.name: Duplicate function names
checks.detail: No shadowed function names.

checks.name: Dead functions (defined, never referenced)
checks.detail: e.g. openAddAdmin, openCreateTeam

checks.name: Functions > 150 lines
checks.detail: longest: showDetail (240), renderTeamGate (152)

checks.name: DB tables created
checks.detail: 170 migrations.

checks.name: Orphan tables (created, app never queries)
checks.detail: feedback, profile_private, schedule_entries

checks.name: Ghost tables (queried, never created)
checks.detail: None — audit_app guards this.

checks.name: audit_app gate (structure, secrets, XSS guard, ratchet)
checks.detail: The build-blocking app auditor.

checks.name: audit_db gate (RLS, tenant scoping, destructive SQL)
checks.detail: The build-blocking DB auditor.

checks.name: Off-site scripts/styles loaded
checks.detail: No third-party script/style hosts.

checks.name: Cross-kitchen XSS escapers wired
checks.detail: sanitizeForeignRecipe + sanitizeForeignIngredient guard foreign innerHTML.

checks.name: innerHTML sinks
checks.detail: High but expected for a render-by-innerHTML single-file app; foreign data is escaped at the data boundary (see escapers above).

checks.name: Explicit kitchen_id filters in app reads
checks.detail: Defence-in-depth on top of RLS; not every query needs it (RLS enforces isolation).

checks.name: Tables with RLS enabled
checks.detail: audit_db fails the build if any kitchen-scoped table lacks RLS + a policy.

checks.name: Secrets in edge functions
checks.detail: No hard-coded API keys in supabase/functions.

checks.name: Leftover "ChefOS" brand in docs
checks.detail: All docs are on-brand (Sautero).

checks.name: Bilingual docs complete (SK/EN)
checks.detail: Every doc with a language toggle carries both languages.

checks.name: build_docs sources missing
checks.detail: All merge sources exist.

checks.name: Daily/log docs fresh (≤3 days behind git)
checks.detail: diary / automations / status current with git (2026-07-21).

checks.name: Dashboards in visual data/
checks.detail: Investor deck, status, backlog, monetization, brand, health, etc.

checks.name: Docs carrying a date stamp
checks.detail: A dated stamp lets a reader trust freshness.

checks.name: TODO / FIXME / HACK / XXX markers
checks.detail: Tracked debt notes in the code; not bugs, but the backlog of "come back to this".

checks.name: Stray console.log
checks.detail: No debug logging left in production.

checks.name: Stray debugger statements
checks.detail: None.

checks.name: Unchecked mutation ratchet
checks.detail: Silent-no-op delete/update call sites; audit_app fails if this number grows.

checks.name: Dead functions
checks.detail: Defined but never referenced — safe to prune during consolidation.

checks.name: DB-contract rebrand debt (guarded)
checks.detail: chefos-named DB identifiers kept on purpose (live schema); a coordinated migration is the only correct way to rename them. Guarded by check_db_contract.
